---
title: "A highly heterogeneous disease"
root: ".."
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page is a **scaffold**. Replace placeholder text with your own writing and add citations to key review papers and consensus statements.
:::

## Heterogeneity across individuals

*Placeholder:* Describe heterogeneity in:
- Symptoms and cognitive profiles
- Disease progression rates
- Biomarker trajectories
- Comorbidity patterns

## Biological heterogeneity

*Placeholder:* Discuss heterogeneity driven by:
- Genetics and ancestry
- Sex-related biology and gendered exposures
- Proteomic / metabolomic signatures
- Co-pathologies (vascular, Lewy bodies, etc.)

## Methodological consequences

*Placeholder:* Explain why heterogeneity makes:
- Model generalisation harder
- Biomarker thresholds fragile across populations
- Harmonisation and standardised reporting essential

## Take-away

*Placeholder:* 3–5 bullet points.
